summary: Clear cfg.SurgegraphToken (and re-stamp AuthSource) before saveConfigTOML in auth login.
reason: config.Load() preserves any token = "…" entry written by a prior `auth set-token`, and AuthHeader() checks SurgegraphToken before AccessToken. Without clearing it on the OAuth-login transition the stale static credential would silently win on the next CLI invocation and the OAuth login would be a no-op from the caller's perspective.
